message:
fix: Proper memory management - MPSGraph cleanup working!

Addressed memory leak issues:
✅ MPSGraph properly released when shape changes
✅ MPSGraph properly released on deinit
✅ Old graphs released before creating new ones
✅ Program completes without crashes

Buffer leak status:
⚠️ Metal buffers (kv_cache, etc.) leak on shutdown
   - Releasing causes GPU driver crashes (IOGPU/AGXMetalG14X)
   - Metal internally holds hidden references
   - Acceptable for shutdown (OS reclaims resources)
   - Documented for production consideration

Technical details:
- Fixed: Release old graph before creating new one (line 194-197)
- Fixed: Properly call mps.releaseGraph() in deinit (line 92-94)
- Documented: Buffer leak reasoning (line 150-159)

Result: Clean shutdown, no crashes, MPSGraph properly managed!
